title: 1 Pack Double Spouts Measuring Triple Pitcher Milk Cup with Wood Handle 75ML Espresso Shot Glasses Parts Clear Glass By BCnmviku
description:
About this item
Double Spouts, Convenient Pouring Wood Handle
1Pack Milk Pitcher Jug with Anti-scald Wooden Handle
Made of premium clear, thick-walled, borosilicate, heat-resistant glass
Made of premium clear, thick-walled, borosilicate, heat-resistant glass
When you receive measuring glass is broken， Please contact us immediately. We will immediately We will help you solve the problem.
reviews_5s: Worth the money. Super sleet and nice to look at you can leave them out with worry that they look out of place. They are not very heavy being single pane glass. They are perfect size for double shots and super easy to clean. They have measurements on the glass from 15ml to 75ml. Handles haven’t broken off and they feel pretty sturdy, so should last you a lot time.I love these cute little espresso glasses! The measurement lines are nice and the pour spouts are great. I always hand wash since the handle is wood, but yeah they are a perfect addition to my homes coffee bar.A bit pricey for what it is, but I wanted a wooden handle espresso shot cup to match my other wooden espresso accessories. Looks great! I specifically wanted a cup with a spout to avoid making a mess. This one does that well. There are cheaper options for what looks like the same product, but this had better reviews about durability. The glass is pretty thin, but it has held up so far to daily use over the past few weeks. I do only hand wash it however. More time will be the real judge of durability!I love this item but unfortunately it is glass and with curious counter surfing dogs gets broken easily when nudged off the counter. IT DOES NOT BOUNCE, It shatters. Reasonably priced so replacement is not too painful.I have profitec go and it has pretty low clearance. So I am using these cups for my daily extraction. Work pretty good and easy to washWorks great for measuring out mixers or pulling espresso shots. Cleans up easily and does what it is supposed to do. I choose to hand wash because of the wooden handle - not sure if it is dishwasher safe.Perfect weight and size for my espresso machinePerfect for measuring my espresso since my espresso machine doesn’t stop by itselfMy husband make and drink coffee daily, he love these.Good price! I love it
reviews_1s: Love these Spouts Measuring Triple Pitcher Milk Cup, but I was disappointed to see when arrived one was broken. I have to return it.Handle broke off. Never went in the dishwasher, was handled with careEs para que no sirve para nada demasiado pequeñaThese are beautiful and tiny (75ml) to be exact. They hold exact two coffee shots. I had in mind something bigger but they do the job.Loved this cute cup but the handle just popped off at where it was sealed to the glass cup after just 6 months. We just use it to pour the brew into a glass once a day so no reason for this, wasn’t done in washing or with any rough handling. Could be dangerous if spilled the hot coffee. Too bad as it is adorable. Could be a tiny bit bigger like a full 4 oz as well.The handle broke after using it only 2 times! I was washing it and it snapped right off. Do not buy; go with another seller! So disappointing and a waste of money!if you want this for measurement, just keep in mind that after you wash it a couple of times you will no longer be able to see what is written on the glass.Barely usable, the marks on the cup are misaligned and is slanted which is the all point of the measurement. Disappointed and returnedThis cup is not big enough to hold my double shots. I now just use my measuring cup with the handle on it, works perfectly. The only reason that I didn't send it back was because I didn't pay that much for it.Would be a nice product if it had more capacity. I returned it because the volume was too small. My espresso shots are larger than it would hold with a double shot.
